title: Repurposed Structures - Bountiful Compat
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Bountiful. The Bounty Board structures are tailored to each Overworld RS Village! 

Fabric:
- Bountiful mod can be obtained from here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bountiful-fabric

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric

Forge:
- Bountiful mod can be obtained from here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bountiful

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CUfOpYVR/images/fe9e48290fcbd02f8b37339f9336cca561222f1b.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CUfOpYVR/images/fe9e48290fcbd02f8b37339f9336cca561222f1b.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
